title: I Had No Idea What an Order Book Was. Now I've Built One That Handles 18k RPS.
brief: My system specs, because benchmarks without hardware context are just creative fiction. 13th Gen Intel Core i5-13500HX (20 threads, 4.70 GHz boost), 16 GB RAM, Fedora 43 (kernel 6.19.8). The assignment asked for 2,000 req/s. The system ended up doing 18,210.
